characters.name: Agent Guy
characters.description: Agent Guywas the owner of the "cherry '63 T-Bird" thatBryce Varleyran into first by accident then repeatedly out of frustration over learning about his death sentence from renal cancer.

characters.name: Agent No 2
characters.description: Agent No 2confiscatedDemetri Noh's cell phone at the beginning of the search for the mole at theLos Angeles Field Office.  Later, he was standing in the conference room whenMarcie Turoffdecided she had been identified as the mole.  Marcie grabbed his weapon and he became her first victim as she shot him through the right groin from the back.

characters.name: Alda Hertzog's accomplice
characters.description: The accomplice outside the window Alda Hertzog's accompliceis an unknown man who initially poses as awindow washeroutside the courtroom ofAlda Hertzog's hearing. At the hearing, Hertzog, withZoey Andataas her lawyer, claims to haveappendicitis. Before going inside the courtroom, Hertzog makes eye contact with the window washer, suggesting he is some sort of accomplice. When she leaves the courtroom, the window washer detonates an explosive that blows out the window, enabling Hertzog to make her escape.("The Garden of Forking Paths")

characters.name: Ingrid Alvarez
characters.description: Ingrid Alvarezlived inBarstow, Californiaand ran apetstore specializing inbirdscalledBird's Plus.("Playing Cards with Coyote") She witnessed the murder ofNeil Parofsky. Parofsky gave a briefcase totwo menwiththree-star tattoosand was then killed by the men. Alvarez caught the entire incident, which she thought was a mugging, on cell phone video. She also heard the men discussing "QED".("Playing Cards with Coyote") The three-star tattoo men then tried to kill Alvarez but instead killed her roommateBlanca.("Playing Cards with Coyote")

characters.name: Zoey Andata
characters.description: Zoey Andatais engaged toDemetri Noh. Zoey had been planning her wedding to Demetri, and wanted their first dance to be to the song "Islands in the Stream", which they often sang together in karaoke bars while they were dating. She was visitingSeattlewhen theglobal blackoutoccurred. In her flashforward, Zoey originally claims to see herself walking barefoot in the sand on her wedding day. A distant figure was glimpsed ahead of her, walking either toward or away from her but was assumed by Zoey to be Demetri. A second figure, next to the distant figure assumed to be Demetri, may have also been present.

characters.name: Keiko Arahida
characters.description: Keiko Arahidais aJapanesewoman who appears inBryce Varley'sflashforward. In the Japanese language, which puts family names before given names, her name would beあらひだ・けいこ Arahida Keiko. Arahida lives inTokyo, and her parents work in a restaurant.("Believe")She plays guitar and is a fan ofJimi Hendrix.("Believe")She enjoys salsa dancing.("Believe") Arahida has likedroboticssince she was a teenager.("Believe")She majored inmechanical engineeringas an undergraduate at theUniversity of Tokyo, where she graduated at the top of the class, and has a masters degree inbiomedical engineeringand robotics.("Believe")She gets a job at Nakahara, a leading Japanese robotics firm.("Believe")

characters.name: Yuuka Arahida
characters.description: Yuuka ArahidaisKeiko Arahida's mother. She flies to Los Angeles to getKeikowho flew to Los Angeles to chase her flashforward.  She has a change of heart at the end while at the airport and causes a distraction so Keiko can escape.

characters.name: Asian Man
characters.description: After the blackout, theAsian Manruns up to Mark, frantic, and points to something and starts rambling in an Asian language. Mark is about to help him, but an automobile gas tank explodes and they are separated.

characters.name: Assistant U.S. Attorney
characters.description: TheAssistant U.S. Attorneywas representing the Government at the trial in whichZoey AndatadestroyedDemetri Noh's testimony.  The Assistant U.S. Attorney objected when Zoey's line of questioning became argumentative.

characters.name: Attaf
characters.description: Attafis a young boy whomFelicia Wedecksees living at her home in her flashforward. Attaf was seen in the company of a woman wearing a Muslim headscarf at the memorial service for eight FBI agents. The name "Attaf" also appears in the marquee of the movie theater Mark walks by on his way to find Olivia right after the GBO; it says the movie showing is "The Tale of Attaf". "The Tale of Attaf" is one of the stories in the Arabic story collection "One Thousand and One Nights ", and evolves around a self-fulfilling prophecy.

characters.description: Awaalewas an interpreter who accompaniedMarshall Vogeland his party to theGanwararea of Somalia. He was executed byAbdi Khalifwhile trying to explain that Vogel and the others were withRed Panda Resources.

characters.name: Fiona Banks
characters.description: Fiona Banksis an inspector atNew Scotland Yard. Fiona was a liaison between Scotland Yard and theLos AngelesFBI. Fiona met with Al Gough in herLondonoffice at 6 am on April 30, 2010. They were working on the Rutherford case. Their conversation was interrupted when a bird flew into the window, breaking its neck.

characters.name: Paul Becker
characters.description: Paul Beckerspoke withZoey Andataafter she made a cell call to the Noh residence. Becker asked Zoey if she were attending the memorial for a woman named Joyce.

characters.name: Mark Benford
characters.description: Special AgentMark Benfordworks for theLos AngelesField Office of theFBI. A recovering alcoholic, Mark has been sober seven years and is a loving and committed family man, a family that includes his wife,Olivia, and daughter,Charlie. In the wake of theGBO, Mark finds himself at the center of theMosaic Task Force, an investigation dedicated to uncovering who caused theGBOand why. Mark’s drive to piece together the mystery comes at a great personal sacrifice. In hisflash forward, Mark saw himself drinking, a clear sign that he is headed down a difficult path. Complicating matters further isOlivia, who had a vision of herself in love and together withLloyd Simcoe, the man who claimed responsibility for helping cause theGBO. To make matters worse, Mark’s partner and friend,Demetri Noh, has learned that he is going to be murdered on March 15th, 2010, with Mark’s gun. Now, Mark is determined to do everything he can to save his marriage, his partner, and get to the bottom of the mystery behind theGBOitself. Mark is on a stake-out withDemetri.("No More Good Days")

characters.name: Charlie Benford
characters.description: Charlie Benfordis the daughter ofMarkandOlivia Benford. On the morning of the flash, Charlie was watching cartoons in the kitchen while her father cooked her breakfast. Later, she was playing with her babysitter,Nicole Kirby, while her mother was on the phone. She was in bed taking a nap at the time ofthe blackout event. Charlie'sflashforward.("Better Angels")

characters.name: Olivia Benford
characters.description: Olivia Benfordis a successful trauma surgeon atAngeles Hospital. She is tough when it comes to mentoring her interns, but her vast knowledge and compassion for her patients has garnered her respect from her colleagues. Much of her empathy stems from her love of children, especially her daughter,Charlie. At home, her marriage toMarkhas been tested by what she saw in herflash forward, a vision of herself romantically involved withLloyd Simcoe. Olivia believes strongly in her marriage and has fought against her attraction toLloyd, but the universe continues to cross their paths in ways she cannot ignore. Olivia Benford was originally going to attendHarvard Universityand live in a building next to the cigar shop Leavitt & Pierce in Harvard Square. However, her husbandMark Benfordgot a job in theLos AngelesFBIfield office, and she followed him to Los Angeles instead. If she had stayed at Harvard,Lloyd Simcoe, who was at Harvard at the same time, would have been living next door to her.("A561984")

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: Billywas a clerk atIngrid Alvarez' bird shop.  He helped Ingrid lock up the night she sawNeil Parofskymurdered by two men, one of whom had aThree-star tattoo.

characters.name: Blanca
characters.description: Blancawas the roommate ofIngrid Alvarez.("Playing Cards with Coyote") Blanca was mentioned but never seen on-screen, as she was killed bythree-star tattoo menlooking for Alvarez after Alvarez witnessed their murder ofNeil Parofsky.("Playing Cards with Coyote")

characters.name: Pierre Boisteau
characters.description: Pierre Boisteauis an eighteenth-century French writer (a French Humanist in reality) whose books contained illustrations of monsters in the series. In reality, he wrote a few books rather about the French language and translated many Latin texts or plays of William Shakespeare in French.("Better Angels") After finding out fromLloyd SimcoethatD. GibbonsisDyson Frostand that Frost was supposedly killed on a boat namedLe monstre de Boisteau,Mark Benfordfigures out that thehydra paintinghe saw on theMosaic Investigation wallin hisflashforwardis an illustration from a book by Boisteau.("Better Angels") The word "BOISTEAU" appears in white onDyson Frost's wall.("The Garden of Forking Paths")

characters.name: Boy
characters.description: TheBoyhanded Mark Benford a backpack, explaining that a man had paid him fifty dollars to perform the task.

characters.name: Boy

characters.name: Assistant Director Bramwell
characters.description: Assistant Director Bramwell(listen(help·info)) is an Assistant Director of theFederal Bureau of Investigation. He is not seen onscreen and his first name is unknown. Two years before theGlobal Blackout, Bramwell sentJanis Hawkto seeMarshall Vogel. Vogel told Hawk that theCIAsuspects that something big is happening and that she will be contacted to be a mole. Vogel wanted her to act as a double agent, going undercover and pretending to be a mole.("Goodbye Yellow Brick Road")

characters.name: Broadcaster
characters.description: The "broadcaster" was reading the story aboutJoyce Clementehaving been selected byPresidentDave Segoviato beVice President.
